description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that triggers on push. Run three jobs in parallel: clang-cl, msvc, and mingw. The clang-cl and msvc jobs run on a windows-2025 environment, checking out the code, caching CPM.cmake packages, setting up the environment, configuring and building with CMake and clang-cl or MSVC, and running unit tests. The mingw job runs in a Fedora container on an ubuntu-latest environment, installing dependencies, checking out the code, and building with CMake and MinGW.
